evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下这个需求的测试范围，proposal.md 已经写好了。
evals.expected_output: 读取 proposal.md，执行推理式策略选择，产出 requirements-analysis.md，包含直觉扫描、功能模块拆解、风险点、需求审问清单和上下文元数据。

assertions.text: Reads proposal.md from the current change directory
Includes intuition scan section with confidence rating
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && grep -qi "直觉\|intuition\|confidence" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Produces structured module breakdown with business rules, boundary values, and risk points
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Generates requirement interrogation checklist with prioritized questions
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -qi "审问\|interrogat\|清单\|checklist" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Seeds context metadata with risks_identified, material_quality, and strategy_used
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "risks_identified\|material_quality\|strategy_used" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 这个 PRD 有哪些要测的？重点关注安全和权限方面。
evals.expected_output: 分析模式偏向 feasibility + completeness，安全和权限模块获得更深入的分析，风险点聚焦认证授权。

assertions.text: Strategy selection reflects user's focus on security and permissions
Security and permission modules receive deeper analysis than other modules
Risk points include authentication, authorization, and session-related concerns
Does not include implementation details (Redis, database tables, etc.)
Interrogation questions focus on security-relevant gaps

evals.prompt: 产品回复了审问清单的问题：连续密码错误 5 次锁定 30 分钟，锁定期间显示倒计时。退款失败不自动重试，人工处理。
evals.expected_output: 触发合并模式，将回答整合进 requirements-analysis.md，更新审问清单状态，合并新规则到对应模块。

assertions.text: Matches answers to specific questions in the interrogation checklist
Updates matched questions to '已澄清' status with product answers
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -qi "已澄清" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Merges new business rules into the corresponding module analysis sections
Updates context metadata: removes clarified items from open_questions
Reports how many answers were merged and which modules were updated

evals.prompt: 分析需求，testlib 里应该已经有登录模块的历史用例了。
evals.expected_output: 扫描 testspec/testlib/index.json，匹配登录模块已有覆盖，在分析中标注可复用功能点和回归风险。

assertions.text: Checks for testspec/testlib/index.json existence
assertions.script: test -f testspec/testlib/index.json && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Scans index for modules matching the current change scope
Reports existing coverage: reusable features and case counts
Identifies regression risk features in testlib_coverage context metadata
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "testlib_coverage\|testlib_reuse" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Includes 'existing test coverage' section in the analysis output
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -qi "已有.*覆盖\|existing.*coverage\|testlib" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL
